meta_title: For Students: debugging with AI to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Scaling Your First Student SaaS Project
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale your code. Learn how to leverage AI-driven debugging with Antigravity and Claude Code to build robust, production-ready applications.
content.answer_block: To scale your projects effectively, move away from manual trial-and-error. Integrate AI-driven debugging workflows using Antigravity for architectural analysis and Claude Code for iterative refactoring. By automating dependency tracking and error resolution, you reduce technical debt, allowing your codebase to handle increased complexity without collapsing under manual maintenance.
content.intro:
You’ve crossed the threshold from 'Hello World' to building actual products, but the horizon is darkening. Your once-clean codebase is now a tangle of spaghetti logic, circular dependencies, and bugs that appear whenever you add a single feature. You’re hitting the scaling wall—the point where your enthusiasm meets the cold, hard reality of technical debt.

This isn't a failure; it’s an initiation. Every senior engineer has stood where you are, staring at a terminal full of cryptic tracebacks. The secret to breaking through isn't working harder; it's changing your debugging architecture. By offloading the cognitive load of debugging to AI agents, you transform your development process from a reactive struggle into a proactive, scalable engineering flow.

steps.title: Architectural Audit with Antigravity
steps.description: Before fixing bugs, map your dependencies to identify bottleneck regions in your codebase that impede scalability.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this codebase for circular dependencies and high-coupling modules. Provide a dependency graph and suggest three areas to decouple for better scalability.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze architecture and output dependency_graph.md'

steps.title: Automated Error Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed your stack traces into Claude Code to identify the root cause before writing a single line of repair code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Examine this stack trace and suggest a refactor to prevent this error from recurring during high-concurrency operations.

steps.title: Refactoring for Modularity
steps.description: Use AI to break down monolithic functions into testable, isolated units that facilitate easier scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this monolithic service into modular, dependency-injected functions to improve testability and scalability.

steps.title: Integrating Automated Regression Tests
steps.description: Generate comprehensive test suites based on your new modular structure to ensure features don't break during scaling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate unit and integration tests for the recently refactored service to ensure 90% coverage on edge cases.

steps.title: Performance Bottleneck Resolution
steps.description: Identify and optimize slow-running database queries or API calls that limit your application's growth potential.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify potential N+1 query patterns or inefficient loops in this data layer that will fail at scale.

pro_tips: Always define a 'Context Window' limit for your AI to prevent hallucination during complex refactors.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Architecture Decision Records' (ADRs) so you can track why you made specific scaling choices.
Never let AI commit code directly to main; always branch and use Claude Code to open a draft PR for human review.
Treat your AI as a junior developer: provide clear documentation strings before asking it to debug.
Run periodic 'AI-assisted code reviews' every Friday to catch scaling issues before they become technical debt.
content.next_steps: Once you have stabilized your current project, deploy it to a staging environment and run load testing tools to see how your refactored code handles simulated traffic spikes.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by top-tier engineers to maintain sanity while scaling complex applications. Stop fighting your code and start architecting for growth. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
